name: ive-been-thinking
description: Maria Shriver's 'I've Been Thinking...: Reflections, Prayers, and Meditations for a Meaningful Life' — a collection of heartfelt reflections on finding purpose, cultivating inner strength, embracing gratitude, navigating change, and building a life of meaning through faith, family, and self-awareness.
useCase: Finding daily inspiration and spiritual reflection, cultivating gratitude and positive thinking, navigating life transitions with faith, building inner peace and resilience, and connecting with the power of prayer and meditation.
knownRisks: Written from a Christian perspective — uses 'God' and 'prayer' language
Not a scholarly or theological work — personal reflections only
Some may find the tone too optimistic or simplistic for deep suffering
Author comes from privilege (Kennedy family) — may not resonate with all experiences
